account_id.description: account email address and a stable unique id. It is unique within a project, must be 6-30 characters long, and match the regular expression `[a-z]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])` to comply with RFC1035. Changing this forces a new service account to be created.

display_name.description: Can be updated without creating a new resource.

description.description: Must be less than or equal to 256 UTF-8 bytes.

disabled.description: Must be set after creation to disable a service account.

project.description: Defaults to the provider project configuration.
